description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/qosenergy/squalus/ci:2020-01-07 and defining stages test and publish with variables for MySQL, PostgreSQL and MSSQL credentials. In the test stage add a test job that runs test/test.sh --main, uses services mysql:8.0, postgres:15.1 and an mssql alias to mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:2022-CU5-ubuntu-20.04, and stores coverage.out as an artifact. Also add a test-old-db-versions job that runs test/test.sh with services mysql:5.7, postgres:11.6 and an mssql alias to mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:2017-CU18-ubuntu-16.04, and a test-previous-db-versions job that runs test/test.sh --main with services mysql:8.0, postgres:12.1 and an mssql alias to mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:2019-GDR1-ubuntu-16.04, each publishing coverage.out as an artifact. In the publish stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, depends on test, creates a directory public/coverage/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and generates an HTML coverage report with go tool cover -html=coverage.out -o=public/coverage/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME/index.html, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
